source.name: 2025 CISO Village Survey: AI, Risk, and the Road Ahead

methodology_notes: 110+ CISOs (significant technology + financial-services representation; Team8 is an Israeli cyber VC, so helps ground non-US / Israel-network views). Published July 2025. Most current strong signal on AI-agent adoption and AI-attack reality.

distributions.context: Nearly 70% of enterprises already have AI agents in production; another 23% plan deployments in 2026.
1 in 4 CISOs report experiencing an AI-generated attack in the past year (likely understated — AI-driven threats mimic human activity).
77% of CISOs believe SOC analysts will be the first roles replaced by AI.
Securing AI agents (37%) and employees' use of AI tools (36%) ranked as the most urgent AI concerns.
Hardest issues to detect today are business-logic issues (37%), privacy/data leakage (20%), and design flaws (20%) — not classic vulnerabilities.
